title: Tango RaaS Catalog Item
description: Schema for a reward item in the Tango RaaS catalog

utid.description: Universal Token ID — unique identifier for this reward item

brandName.description: Name of the brand offering the reward

brandKey.description: Unique key identifier for the brand

currencyCode.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the reward denomination

minValue.description: Minimum denomination value for open-denomination rewards

maxValue.description: Maximum denomination value for open-denomination rewards

fixedValue.description: Fixed denomination value; null for open-denomination rewards

valueType.description: Whether the reward has a fixed or variable denomination

rewardType.description: Category type of the reward (e.g. gift card, prepaid card, donation)

status.description: Availability status of the reward item

countries.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes where this reward is available

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the catalog item was added
